notes_candidate: PLGA (RG502H) MW range was 7000-17000 Da. SD for size: 4 nm, PDI: 0.02, D.C.%: 0.19, E.E.%: 1.12. Tween 80 was dissolved in the organic phase (acetone) with MB and PLGA. Yield%: 43.21 ± 2.69.
PLGA (RG502H) MW range was 7000-17000 Da. SD for size: 5 nm, PDI: 0.10, D.C.%: 0.26, E.E.%: 1.54. Span® 80 (0.5% w/v) was used in the first emulsion (W1/O) phase. Yield%: 39.98 ± 6.32.

PLGA (RG502H) MW range was 7000-17000 Da. SD for size: 6 nm, PDI: 0.06, D.C.%: 0.43, E.E.%: 2.58. SC6OH (amphiphilic cyclodextrin) was dissolved in the organic phase (acetone) with MB and PLGA. Yield%: 36.12 ± 3.21.

PLGA (RG502H) MW range was 7000-17000 Da. SD for size: 2 nm, PDI: 0.08, D.C.%: 0.38, E.E.%: 2.31. SC6OH (amphiphilic cyclodextrin) was dissolved in the organic phase (acetone) with MB and PLGA. Yield%: 40.58 ± 1.89.

PLGA (RG502H) MW range was 7000-17000 Da. SD for size: 5 nm, PDI: 0.04, D.C.%: 0.61, E.E.%: 3.65. SC6OH (amphiphilic cyclodextrin) was dissolved in the organic phase (acetone) with MB and PLGA. Yield%: 34.14 ± 5.61.

PLGA (RG502H) MW range was 7000-17000 Da. SD for size: 2 nm, PDI: 0.08, D.C.%: 0.31, E.E.%: 1.86. SC6OH (amphiphilic cyclodextrin) was dissolved in the organic phase (acetone) with MB and PLGA. Yield%: 40.85 ± 4.01.
